data.name: wifiDb
data.documentation: Seed CPE map byId; runtime merges are in-memory only.

routes.documentation: SOAP 1.1 endpoint; route by SOAPAction header

responses.body:
{{#if (includes (stringify (bodyRaw)) 'soapenv:Envelope')}}
{{#with (dataRaw 'wifiDb' (concat 'byId.' (body 'soapenv:Envelope.soapenv:Body.v1:GetCpeIdRequest.v1:cpeId._text')))}}
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="http://wifi-admin.local/platform/v1">
  <soap:Body>
    <tns:GetCpeIdResponse>
      <tns:configuration>
        <tns:cpeId>{{cpeId}}</tns:cpeId>
        <tns:wifiBand>{{wifiBand}}</tns:wifiBand>
        <tns:ssid>{{ssid}}</tns:ssid>
        {{#if encryptionType}}<tns:encryptionType>{{encryptionType}}</tns:encryptionType>{{/if}}
        {{#if password}}<tns:password>{{password}}</tns:password>{{/if}}
      </tns:configuration>
    </tns:GetCpeIdResponse>
  </soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>
{{else}}
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
  <soap:Body>
    <soap:Fault>
      <faultcode>tns:NotFound</faultcode>
      <faultstring>CPE not found</faultstring>
    </soap:Fault>
  </soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>
{{/with}}
{{else}}
{{#with (dataRaw 'wifiDb' (concat 'byId.' (body 'soap:Envelope.soap:Body.tns:GetCpeIdRequest.tns:cpeId._text')))}}
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="http://wifi-admin.local/platform/v1">
  <soap:Body>
    <tns:GetCpeIdResponse>
      <tns:configuration>
        <tns:cpeId>{{cpeId}}</tns:cpeId>
        <tns:wifiBand>{{wifiBand}}</tns:wifiBand>
        <tns:ssid>{{ssid}}</tns:ssid>
        {{#if encryptionType}}<tns:encryptionType>{{encryptionType}}</tns:encryptionType>{{/if}}
        {{#if password}}<tns:password>{{password}}</tns:password>{{/if}}
      </tns:configuration>
    </tns:GetCpeIdResponse>
  </soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>
{{else}}
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
  <soap:Body>
    <soap:Fault>
      <faultcode>tns:NotFound</faultcode>
      <faultstring>CPE not found</faultstring>
    </soap:Fault>
  </soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>
{{/with}}
{{/if}}
responses.label: getCpeID

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">

      <faultcode>soap:Client</faultcode>

</soap:Envelope>
